narrative:
North Royalton-04-C (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 903 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
